exercises.prompt: Do you remember 'class imbalance' from Unit 128? What does it mean?
exercises.explain: Class imbalance occurs when one category has way fewer examples than others, making it hard for AI to learn about the rare category.

options.text: An uneven distribution where one class has very few training examples compared to others
A bug where the AI model completely crashes during training
When a dataset contains only synthetic images and no real-world photos

cards.body: Imagine trying to teach an AI to recognize a rare disease with only two patient scans. It would struggle! But what if a GAN could generate thousands of realistic variations of those rare scans to help it learn?
cards.title: The Rare Data Problem
Targeted Data Augmentation
cards.body: Using GANs to generate minority class examples is a smart way to fix class imbalance. The Generator learns the subtle features of the rare class and creates brand-new, realistic variations of it.

Think of an art student who only has one rare fossil to practice sketching. A GAN acts like a master sculptor who creates dozens of slightly different, realistic replica fossils so the student can practice from every possible angle!
cards.title: The Sculptor's Replicas

cards.body: A medical AI needs to spot rare brain tumors, but the database only has 5 tumor scans and 10,000 healthy scans. A GAN generates 9,995 realistic simulated tumor scans, balancing the dataset perfectly so the AI can train effectively.
cards.title: Balancing Medical Data
It's Not Simple Copying!
cards.body: You might think GANs just copy and paste the same rare images. In reality, they generate entirely new, unique images with different angles, lighting, and shapes based on the patterns they learned.
See how GANs change the training landscape by balancing the scales.

left.text: 10,000 Healthy Scans vs. 5 Rare Tumor Scans (AI ignores the rare class)

right.text: 10,000 Healthy Scans vs. 10,000 Combined Real & GAN-Generated Tumor Scans

cards.title: Before vs. After GAN Balancing

exercises.prompt: How do GANs help fix class imbalance in a dataset?
exercises.explain: GANs generate synthetic images that mimic the key features of the rare class, creating a balanced dataset for training.

options.text: By creating realistic, synthetic variations of the rare class to balance the training data
By deleting normal examples until they match the rare category's count
By rewriting the AI's code to ignore the normal data entirely

exercises.explain: GANs do not just duplicate existing files; they generate brand-new, unique images with natural variations.
exercises.prompt: True or False: GANs balance datasets by simply duplicating the exact same rare images over and over.

exercises.explain: Class imbalance happens when one category has very few samples compared to the others, which GANs can fix.
exercises.sentence: We use GANs to generate rare class examples to solve the problem of class [blank].
exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the sentence.
Which scenario highlights the use of a GAN to handle rare classes?

options.text: An AI trained on synthetic rust patterns generated by a GAN to spot rare pipeline damage.
A researcher taking 5,000 manual photos of common metal pipes.

exercises.explain: Generating realistic variations of rare defects to train a classifier is a classic use of GAN-based data augmentation.

options.text: The classifier gets enough diverse examples to learn the rare class's patterns properly
The classifier learns to only recognize fake images and ignores real ones
The training dataset becomes smaller and faster to process

exercises.explain: Generating new, diverse examples of the rare class allows the classifier to learn its key features without overfitting to a tiny sample size. Next, we will explore how GANs can be used for artistic style transfer!
exercises.prompt: Why is generating realistic variations of a rare class better for a classifier than just training on a few real images?

concept: GANs can specifically target class imbalance (callback to Unit 128) by generating realistic variations of rare minority classes, like medical defects.
title: Augmenting Rare Classes with GANs
